name: NotebookLM
one_liner: Google's AI research and note-taking assistant
auth_note: Google Cloud OAuth 2.0 bearer token (gcloud auth print-access-token); no consumer API key.
access_note: No public/consumer API. Only a NotebookLM Enterprise API on Google Cloud (Preview), requiring enterprise licensing and setup.
mcp_note: No official MCP server; only unofficial community clients exist for the Enterprise API.
main_blocker: No self-serve API; programmatic access is enterprise-only via a licensed Google Cloud NotebookLM Enterprise deployment.

name: Otter AI
one_liner: AI meeting transcription, notes and insights assistant
auth_note: Official MCP server is OAuth-authenticated with granular permissions; a public REST API for CRM/system integrations was also introduced.
access_note: MCP server and public API are enterprise-focused; MCP setup requires an enterprise account / demo request rather than open self-serve.
mcp_note: Confirmed official Otter MCP Server (help.otter.ai) plus multiple community MCP servers/CLIs.
main_blocker: MCP/API access is gated behind enterprise plans (demo request), limiting self-serve building.

name: Fathom
one_liner: AI meeting notetaker with transcripts and summaries
auth_note: API key auth for own use; OAuth2 for building installable public apps. 60 calls/min across keys.
access_note: Self-serve: generate an API key and make first call in minutes.
mcp_note: No official MCP; several community MCP servers wrap the public API (e.g. trevorwelch/fathom-video-mcp).
main_blocker: None significant; public self-serve REST API with SDKs (TypeScript, Python) and webhooks.

name: Consensus
one_liner: AI search engine over scientific research papers
auth_note: MCP uses OAuth (Claude, ChatGPT, Cursor, etc.); direct/enterprise API uses API key as Bearer token.
access_note: Quick-search API is application-only (baseline ~$0.10/call plus platform fee); results tiered by Consensus plan. Enterprise/unlimited requires contacting Consensus.
mcp_note: Confirmed official MCP server at mcp.consensus.app/mcp with OAuth for major clients.
main_blocker: Direct API access is by application only and paid per-call; MCP is easier but results are plan-limited.

name: Reducto
one_liner: Document parsing and extraction API for AI
auth_note: API key created in Reducto Studio; set via REDUCTO_API_KEY env var.
access_note: Sign up free at studio.reducto.ai, get credits, then pay-as-you-go (Standard tier) with no sales gate.
mcp_note: No official MCP server found; offers REST API plus Python/Node/Go SDKs.
main_blocker: None significant; self-serve API key and credits, though usage is metered/paid.

name: Devin
auth_note: API key as Bearer token (Authorization header), optional X-Org-Id, for both REST API and MCP server.
access_note: API access limited to paid Team/Enterprise plans; self-serve consumer tiers (Free/Pro/Max) do not include programmatic API access.
mcp_note: Confirmed official Devin MCP server at mcp.devin.ai/mcp (sessions, playbooks, knowledge, scheduling).
main_blocker: Programmatic API/MCP key requires a paid Team or Enterprise plan.

name: higgsfield
one_liner: AI image, video and media generation suite
auth_note: Cloud API uses API credentials (env vars) via higgsfield-client SDK; CLI uses device-flow login.
access_note: Self-serve CLI (curl/brew/npm) and Cloud API; generation consumes paid credits.
mcp_note: Official CLI + agent 'skills' repo (higgsfield-ai/skills); MCP support claimed in marketing but not confirmed on official docs.
main_blocker: None to access (self-serve CLI/SDK), though media generation requires paid credits.

name: Mermaid CLI
one_liner: Open-source CLI rendering Mermaid diagrams to images
auth_note: Local open-source tool (mmdc); no authentication required.
access_note: Free open-source, installable via npm (@mermaid-js/mermaid-cli) or Docker.
mcp_note: No MCP server; it is a local diagram-rendering CLI.
main_blocker: None; open-source local CLI directly callable as a skill (input .mmd, output SVG/PNG/PDF).

name: YouTube Transcript
one_liner: Third-party API for YouTube video transcripts
auth_note: Bearer token API key in Authorization header; key from TranscriptAPI dashboard.
access_note: Self-serve with 100 free credits; credit/paid model beyond that.
mcp_note: No official MCP server found; straightforward REST endpoints (transcript, search, channel, playlist).
main_blocker: None significant; self-serve REST API with free starter credits.

name: Grain
one_liner: AI meeting recorder and notetaker for teams
auth_note: Personal Access Tokens and Workspace Access Tokens (Bearer) are self-serve; OAuth2 (auth-code + PKCE) requires registering an app with Grain. Uses Public-Api-Version header.
access_note: PAT/WAT self-serve in settings; workspace API available on the Business plan. OAuth for third-party apps is gated on registration.
mcp_note: No official MCP server confirmed. Official docs describe a REST API (some older sources mention a GraphQL API + TypeScript SDK).
main_blocker: Full workspace API requires a paid Business plan; OAuth apps need manual Grain registration.
